g.text: Web app · Mobile app · API clients
Thought generation · action selection · observation processing
Retry with exponential backoff · circuit breaker (closed / half-open / open)
Checkpoint and resume · graceful degradation · partial result return
Infinite loop detection · max step governor · human-in-the-loop escalation
PostgreSQL (user data, metadata) · Redis (working memory, cache)
Pinecone / Milvus (long-term memory vectors) · S3 (files) · Kafka (async task queue)
